title: 在咖啡店點飲料
scenario: asking for something at a café or shop

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 你好，請問想要喝什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xiǎng yào hē shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xiang3 yao4 he1 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Hello, what would you like to drink?
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠어요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我想要一杯小杯的拿鐵，少冰。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi xiǎo bēi de ná tiě, shǎo bīng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de na2 tie3, shao3 bing1.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I'd like a small latte with light ice.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 작은 사이즈 라떼 한 잔에 얼음 적게 해 주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，拿鐵小杯少冰。請問還要別的嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, ná tiě xiǎo bēi shǎo bīng. Qǐng wèn hái yào bié de ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, na2 tie3 xiao3 bei1 shao3 bing1. Qing3 wen4 hai2 yao4 bie2 de ma?
turns.translation_en: Okay, small latte with light ice. Anything else?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 작은 라떼에 얼음 적게요. 다른 것도 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不用了，謝謝。這樣就好。
turns.pinyin: Bù yòng le, xiè xiè. Zhè yàng jiù hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 yong4 le, xie4 xie4. Zhe4 yang4 jiu4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: No, thank you. That's all.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮습니다, 감사합니다. 이걸로 됐어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，總共是八十塊。內用還是外帶？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zǒng gòng shì bā shí kuài. Nèi yòng hái shì wài dài?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, zong3 gong4 shi4 ba1 shi2 kuai4. Nei4 yong4 hai2 shi4 wai4 dai4?
turns.translation_en: Okay, that's 80 dollars total. For here or to go?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 총 80대만 달러입니다. 드시고 가시나요, 포장하시나요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 外帶，麻煩你。
turns.pinyin: Wài dài, má fan nǐ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wai4 dai4, ma2 fan5 ni3.
turns.translation_en: To go, please.
turns.translation_ko: 포장해 주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題，請等一下。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèn tí, qǐng děng yī xià.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4 ti2, qing3 deng3 yi1 xia4.
turns.translation_en: No problem, please wait a moment.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없습니다, 잠시만 기다려 주세요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer order?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Pretend you are the customer. Order a small latte with light ice for takeout.

title: 確認價錢
scenario: asking for something at a café or shop

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，請問這個紅茶大杯的價錢是多少？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yì si, qǐng wèn zhè ge hóng chá dà bēi de jià qián shì duō shǎo?

turns.translation_en: Excuse me, how much is this large black tea?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 이 홍차 큰 사이즈는 가격이 얼마인가요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 大杯紅茶是三十五塊。
turns.pinyin: Dà bēi hóng chá shì sān shí wǔ kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Da4 bei1 hong2 cha2 shi4 san1 shi2 wu3 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: The large black tea is 35 dollars.
turns.translation_ko: 큰 홍차는 35대만 달러입니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 那中杯的呢？
turns.pinyin: Nà zhōng bēi de ne?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 zhong1 bei1 de ne?
turns.translation_en: And the medium?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 중간 사이즈는요?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 中杯是二十五塊。
turns.pinyin: Zhōng bēi shì èr shí wǔ kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhong1 bei1 shi4 er4 shi2 wu3 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: The medium is 25 dollars.
turns.translation_ko: 중간 사이즈는 25대만 달러입니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好，我要一杯中杯紅茶，少冰，半糖。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ yào yī bēi zhōng bēi hóng chá, shǎo bīng, bàn táng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhong1 bei1 hong2 cha2, shao3 bing1, ban4 tang2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, I'll have a medium black tea, light ice, half sugar.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 중간 사이즈 홍차 한 잔에 얼음 적게, 반 당으로 주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，中杯紅茶少冰半糖，總共二十五塊。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zhōng bēi hóng chá shǎo bīng bàn táng, zǒng gòng èr shí wǔ kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, zhong1 bei1 hong2 cha2 shao3 bing1 ban4 tang2, zong3 gong4 er4 shi2 wu3 kuai4.
turns.translation_en: Okay, medium black tea with light ice and half sugar, total 25 dollars.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 중간 사이즈 홍차에 얼음 적게, 반 당, 총 25대만 달러입니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: How much is the medium black tea?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on polite intonation.
free_response_prompt: Pretend you are the customer. Ask for the price of a large black tea, then order a medium with light ice and half sugar.

title: 請再說一次

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 你好，請問想要喝什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xiǎng yào hē shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xiang3 yao4 he1 shen2 me0?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題。請問...想要喝什麼？

turns.speaker: 店員

turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xiǎo bēi dòu jiāng qù bīng. Hái yào bié de ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, xiao3 bei1 dou4 jiang1 qu4 bing1. Hai2 yao4 bie2 de ma?

turns.speaker: 客人

turns.pinyin: Bù yòng le, xiè xiè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 yong4 le, xie4 xie4.

title: 結帳買東西
scenario: buying items, asking about bags, receipts, payment

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 你好，請問需要袋子嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xūyào dàizi ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 xu1yao4 dai4zi ma?

turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 봉투가 필요하신가요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不用，謝謝。我有一個環保袋。
turns.pinyin: Bù yòng, xièxie. Wǒ yǒu yī ge huánbǎo dài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 yong4, xie4xie. Wo3 you3 yi1 ge huan2bao3 dai4.
turns.translation_en: No, thank you. I have a reusable bag.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 괜찮습니다. 제가 에코백이 있어요.

turns.speaker: 店員

turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, zǒnggòng shì liǎng bǎi sān shí kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, zong3gong4 shi4 liang3 bai3 san1 shi2 kuai4.

turns.translation_ko: 네, 총 230원입니다.

turns.speaker: 客人

turns.pinyin: Wǒ yào yòng xìnyòngkǎ fùkuǎn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 yao4 yong4 xin4yong4ka3 fu4kuan3.

turns.speaker: 店員

turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, qǐng zài zhèlǐ shuākǎ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, qing3 zai4 zhe4li3 shua1ka3.
turns.translation_en: Sure, please swipe your card here.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 여기서 카드를 긁어주세요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好，謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, xièxie.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, xie4xie.

title: 發票問題

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，可以給我發票嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, kěyǐ gěi wǒ fāpiào ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4si, ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 fa1piao4 ma?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，請問要存載具嗎？

turns.speaker: 客人

turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 종이 영수증만 주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題，這是您的發票。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, zhè shì nín de fāpiào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, zhe4 shi4 nin2 de fa1piao4.

title: 付款問題

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，我的信用卡不能刷。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ de xìnyòngkǎ bù néng shuā.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4si, wo3 de xin4yong4ka3 bu4 neng2 shua1.

turns.speaker: 店員

turns.pinyin: Zǒnggòng shì yī bǎi wǔ shí kuài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zong3gong4 shi4 yi1 bai3 wu3 shi2 kuai4.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 這是兩百塊，找零五十塊。

turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 shi4 liang3 bai3 kuai4, zhao3 ling2 wu3 shi2 kuai4.

turns.speaker: 店員

title: 請問洗手間在哪裡？
scenario: finding bathroom, elevator, exit, counter, classroom

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，請問洗手間在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 xi3 shou3 jian1 zai4 na3 li3?

turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 화장실이 어디에 있습니까?

turns.speaker: 店員

turns.pinyin: Diàntī zài zuǒ biān, kàojìn ménkǒu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: dian4 ti1 zai4 zuo3 bian1, kao4 jin4 men2 kou3.
turns.translation_en: The elevator is on the left, near the entrance.
turns.translation_ko: 엘리베이터는 왼쪽, 출구 근처에 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝你，我現在去二樓。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ, wǒ xiànzài qù èr lóu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: xie4 xie5 ni3, wo3 xian4 zai4 qu4 er4 lou2.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, I'll go to the second floor now.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 지금 2층으로 가겠습니다.

title: 請問櫃台在哪裡？
scenario: finding bathroom, elevator, exit, counter, classroom

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，請問櫃台在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn guìtái zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 gui4 tai2 zai4 na3 li3?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, where is the counter?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 카운터가 어디에 있습니까?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 櫃台在一樓，從入口進去，直走，然後左轉就到了。
turns.pinyin: Guìtái zài yī lóu, cóng rùkǒu jìnqù, zhí zǒu, ránhòu zuǒ zhuǎn jiù dào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: gui4 tai2 zai4 yi1 lou2, cong2 ru4 kou3 jin4 qu4, zhi2 zou3, ran2 hou4 zuo3 zhuan3 jiu4 dao4 le5.
turns.translation_en: The counter is on the first floor. Enter through the entrance, go straight, then turn left.
turns.translation_ko: 카운터는 1층에 있습니다. 입구로 들어가서 직진하신 후 왼쪽으로 돌면 됩니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，謝謝。請問出口在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, xièxie. Qǐng wèn chūkǒu zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, xie4 xie5. qing3 wen4 chu1 kou3 zai4 na3 li3?
turns.translation_en: Okay, thank you. Where is the exit?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다. 출구는 어디에 있습니까?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 出口在櫃台旁邊，靠近右邊的門。
turns.pinyin: Chūkǒu zài guìtái pángbiān, kàojìn yòu biān de mén.
turns.pinyin_numeric: chu1 kou3 zai4 gui4 tai2 pang2 bian1, kao4 jin4 you4 bian1 de5 men2.
turns.translation_en: The exit is next to the counter, near the door on the right.
turns.translation_ko: 출구는 카운터 옆, 오른쪽 문 근처에 있습니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝你，我現在去櫃台。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ, wǒ xiànzài qù guìtái.
turns.pinyin_numeric: xie4 xie5 ni3, wo3 xian4 zai4 qu4 gui4 tai2.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, I'll go to the counter now.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 지금 카운터로 가겠습니다.

title: 我走錯樓層了
scenario: finding bathroom, elevator, exit, counter, classroom

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 不好意思，我好像走錯樓層了。請問教室在三樓嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ hǎoxiàng zǒu cuò lóucéng le. Qǐng wèn jiàoshì zài sān lóu ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 hao3 xiang4 zou3 cuo4 lou2 ceng2 le5. qing3 wen4 jiao4 shi4 zai4 san1 lou2 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I think I'm on the wrong floor. Is the classroom on the third floor?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 제가 층을 잘못 온 것 같아요. 교실이 3층에 있습니까?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 是的，教室在三樓。你現在在二樓，需要上去。
turns.pinyin: Shì de, jiàoshì zài sān lóu. Nǐ xiànzài zài èr lóu, xūyào shàngqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: shi4 de5, jiao4 shi4 zai4 san1 lou2. ni3 xian4 zai4 zai4 er4 lou2, xu1 yao4 shang4 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, the classroom is on the third floor. You are on the second floor now, you need to go up.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 교실은 3층에 있습니다. 지금 2층에 계시니 올라가셔야 합니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 好的，請問要怎麼上去？有電梯嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng wèn yào zěnme shàngqù? Yǒu diàntī ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3 de5, qing3 wen4 yao4 zen3 me0 shang4 qu4? you3 dian4 ti1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Okay, how do I go up? Is there an elevator?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 어떻게 올라가야 합니까? 엘리베이터가 있습니까?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 有，電梯在走廊中間，左邊。你也可以走樓梯上去。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, diàntī zài zǒuláng zhōngjiān, zuǒ biān. Nǐ yě kěyǐ zǒu lóutī shàngqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: you3, dian4 ti1 zai4 zou3 lang2 zhong1 jian1, zuo3 bian1. ni3 ye3 ke3 yi3 zou3 lou2 ti1 shang4 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, the elevator is in the middle of the hallway, on the left. You can also take the stairs up.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 엘리베이터는 복도 중간 왼쪽에 있습니다. 계단으로 올라가셔도 됩니다.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝你，我坐電梯上去。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ, wǒ zuò diàntī shàngqù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: xie4 xie5 ni3, wo3 zuo4 dian4 ti1 shang4 qu4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you, I'll take the elevator up.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다. 엘리베이터를 타고 올라가겠습니다.

title: 換一份青菜

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 你好，我剛剛點的是炒飯，可是我想把配菜換成青菜。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ gānggāng diǎn de shì chǎofàn, kěshì wǒ xiǎng bǎ pèicài huàn chéng qīngcài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 hao3, wo3 gang1gang1 dian3 de5 shi4 chao3fan4, ke3shi4 wo3 xiang3 ba3 pei4cai4 huan4 cheng2 qing1cai4.
turns.translation_en: Hello, I just ordered fried rice, but I'd like to change the side dish to greens.
turns.translation_ko: 안녕하세요, 제가 방금 볶음밥을 주문했는데, 반찬을 채소로 바꾸고 싶어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 可以，沒問題。原本的配菜是豆腐，要換成青菜，對嗎？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, méi wèntí. Yuánběn de pèicài shì dòufu, yào huàn chéng qīngcài, duì ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, mei2 wen4ti2. Yuan2ben3 de5 pei4cai4 shi4 dou4fu5, yao4 huan4 cheng2 qing1cai4, dui4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Sure, no problem. The original side dish is tofu, you want to change it to greens, right?
turns.translation_ko: 네, 문제없습니다. 원래 반찬은 두부인데, 채소로 바꾸시는 거 맞나요?

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 對，謝謝。還有，炒飯少油。
turns.pinyin: Duì, xièxie. Hái yǒu, chǎofàn shǎo yóu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, xie4xie5. Hai2 you3, chao3fan4 shao3 you2.
turns.translation_en: Yes, thank you. Also, less oil for the fried rice.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다. 그리고 볶음밥은 기름을 적게 해주세요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 好的，炒飯少油，配菜換成青菜。我幫您改訂單。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, chǎofàn shǎo yóu, pèicài huàn chéng qīngcài. Wǒ bāng nín gǎi dìngdān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de5, chao3fan4 shao3 you2, pei4cai4 huan4 cheng2 qing1cai4. Wo3 bang1 nin2 gai3 ding4dan1.
turns.translation_en: Okay, fried rice with less oil, side dish changed to greens. I'll update the order for you.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 볶음밥 기름 적게, 반찬은 채소로 바꿉니다. 주문서 수정해 드릴게요.

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝。
turns.pinyin: Xièxie.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie5.
turns.translation_en: Thank you.
turns.translation_ko: 감사합니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What change did the customer make?
options_en: Changed the side dish to greens and asked for less oil
options_ko: 반찬을 채소로 바꾸고 기름을 적게 요청했다
comprehension_questions.answer_en: Changed the side dish to greens and asked for less oil

shadowing_prompt: Practice the phrase '把配菜換成青菜' and '少油' with correct tones.
free_response_prompt: Practice changing a side dish and adding a customization (e.g., less oil, less salt) to your order.

title: 早上的習慣

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你每天早上幾點起床？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān zǎoshang jǐ diǎn qǐchuáng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 mei3tian1 zao3shang ji3 dian3 qi3chuang2?
turns.translation_en: What time do you get up every morning?
turns.translation_ko: 당신은 매일 아침 몇 시에 일어납니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我每天早上六點半起床。起床以後先刷牙洗臉，然後穿衣服。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn bàn qǐchuáng. Qǐchuáng yǐhòu xiān shuāyá xǐliǎn, ránhòu chuān yīfu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 mei3tian1 zao3shang liu4 dian3 ban4 qi3chuang2. Qi3chuang2 yi3hou4 xian1 shua1ya2 xi3lian3, ran2hou4 chuan1 yi1fu.
turns.translation_en: I get up at 6:30 every morning. After getting up, I brush my teeth and wash my face first, then get dressed.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 매일 아침 6시 30분에 일어납니다. 일어난 후에 먼저 이를 닦고 세수한 다음, 옷을 입습니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你吃早餐嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ chī zǎocān ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 chi1 zao3can1 ma?
turns.translation_en: Do you eat breakfast?
turns.translation_ko: 아침 식사는 하십니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有，我吃早餐。我喜歡喝一杯咖啡，吃一個三明治。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, wǒ chī zǎocān. Wǒ xǐhuān hē yì bēi kāfēi, chī yí ge sānmíngzhì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, wo3 chi1 zao3can1. Wo3 xi3huan1 he1 yi4 bei1 ka1fei1, chi1 yi2 ge san1ming2zhi4.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I eat breakfast. I like to drink a cup of coffee and eat a sandwich.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 아침 식사를 합니다. 저는 커피 한 잔과 샌드위치 하나를 먹는 것을 좋아합니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你幾點開始上班？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ jǐ diǎn kāishǐ shàngbān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ji3 dian3 kai1shi3 shang4ban1?
turns.translation_en: What time do you start work?
turns.translation_ko: 몇 시에 출근을 시작합니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我八點上班。我從家裡走路到公司，大概二十分鐘。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bā diǎn shàngbān. Wǒ cóng jiā lǐ zǒulù dào gōngsī, dàgài èrshí fēnzhōng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ba1 dian3 shang4ban1. Wo3 cong2 jia1 li3 zou3lu4 dao4 gong1si1, da4gai4 er4shi2 fen1zhong1.
turns.translation_en: I start work at 8. I walk from home to the company, about 20 minutes.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 8시에 출근합니다. 집에서 회사까지 걸어서 약 20분 걸립니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does B do after getting up?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the sequence words like 先, 然後.
free_response_prompt: Describe your own morning routine using 先, 然後, 再.

title: 上班的一天

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你中午在哪裡吃午餐？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhōngwǔ zài nǎlǐ chī wǔcān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zhong1wu3 zai4 na3li3 chi1 wu3can1?
turns.translation_en: Where do you eat lunch at noon?
turns.translation_ko: 점심은 어디에서 드십니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我中午在公司附近的小吃店吃。我喜歡吃滷肉飯和燙青菜。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zhōngwǔ zài gōngsī fùjìn de xiǎochī diàn chī. Wǒ xǐhuān chī lǔròu fàn hé tàng qīngcài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zhong1wu3 zai4 gong1si1 fu4jin4 de xiao3chi1 dian4 chi1. Wo3 xi3huan1 chi1 lu3rou4 fan4 he2 tang4 qing1cai4.
turns.translation_en: I eat at a small eatery near the company at noon. I like to eat braised pork rice and blanched greens.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 점심에 회사 근처의 작은 음식점에서 먹습니다. 루로우판과 데친 채소를 좋아합니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你下午幾點下班？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiàwǔ jǐ diǎn xiàbān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xia4wu3 ji3 dian3 xia4ban1?
turns.translation_en: What time do you get off work in the afternoon?
turns.translation_ko: 오후에 몇 시에 퇴근합니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我下午五點半下班。下班以後，我常常去公園散步。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn bàn xiàbān. Xiàbān yǐhòu, wǒ chángcháng qù gōngyuán sànbù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xia4wu3 wu3 dian3 ban4 xia4ban1. Xia4ban1 yi3hou4, wo3 chang2chang2 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4.
turns.translation_en: I get off work at 5:30 in the afternoon. After work, I often go for a walk in the park.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 오후 5시 30분에 퇴근합니다. 퇴근 후에 저는 자주 공원에 산책하러 갑니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你晚上做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ wǎnshang zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 wan3shang zuo4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: What do you do in the evening?
turns.translation_ko: 저녁에는 무엇을 합니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我晚上回家以後先洗澡，然後吃晚餐。吃完以後看電視或聽音樂。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ wǎnshang huí jiā yǐhòu xiān xǐzǎo, ránhòu chī wǎncān. Chī wán yǐhòu kàn diànshì huò tīng yīnyuè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 wan3shang hui2 jia1 yi3hou4 xian1 xi3zao3, ran2hou4 chi1 wan3can1. Chi1 wan2 yi3hou4 kan4 dian4shi4 huo4 ting1 yin1yue4.
turns.translation_en: After I get home in the evening, I first take a shower, then eat dinner. After eating, I watch TV or listen to music.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 저녁에 집에 돌아온 후에 먼저 샤워하고, 그다음에 저녁 식사를 합니다. 식사 후에는 텔레비전을 보거나 음악을 듣습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does B often do after work?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 퇴근 후에 자주 무엇을 합니까?
options_en: Go to the park for a walk
comprehension_questions.answer_en: Go to the park for a walk

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to time expressions like 中午, 下午, 晚上.
free_response_prompt: Describe your typical workday schedule from morning to evening.

title: 晚上的計畫

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你今天晚上有空嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān wǎnshang yǒu kòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jin1tian1 wan3shang you3 kong4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Are you free this evening?
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 저녁에 시간 있습니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 今天晚上我有空。你想做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jin1tian1 wan3shang wo3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 zuo4 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: I'm free this evening. What do you want to do?
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 저녁에 시간 있습니다. 무엇을 하고 싶으십니까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們一起去吃晚餐，然後看電影，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen yìqǐ qù chī wǎncān, ránhòu kàn diànyǐng, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men yi4qi3 qu4 chi1 wan3can1, ran2hou4 kan4 dian4ying3, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Shall we go out for dinner together, then watch a movie?
turns.translation_ko: 우리 함께 저녁 식사하러 가고, 그다음에 영화 보는 게 어떻습니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好，沒問題。你想吃什麼？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, méi wèntí. Nǐ xiǎng chī shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, mei2 wen4ti2. Ni3 xiang3 chi1 shen2 me0?
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem. What do you want to eat?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 문제없습니다. 무엇을 드시고 싶습니까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想吃牛肉麵。我知道一家很好吃的牛肉麵店。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī niúròu miàn. Wǒ zhīdào yì jiā hěn hǎochī de niúròu miàn diàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 chi1 niu2rou4 mian4. Wo3 zhi1dao4 yi4 jia1 hen3 hao3chi1 de niu2rou4 mian4 dian4.
turns.translation_en: I want to eat beef noodles. I know a very good beef noodle shop.
turns.translation_ko: 소고기 국수를 먹고 싶습니다. 아주 맛있는 소고기 국수 가게를 하나 알고 있습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 太好了！我們晚上七點在餐廳門口見面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒmen wǎnshang qī diǎn zài cāntīng ménkǒu jiànmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le! Wo3men wan3shang qi1 dian3 zai4 can1ting1 men2kou3 jian4mian4, ke3yi3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Great! Shall we meet at the restaurant entrance at 7 p.m.?
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋아요! 저희 저녁 7시에 식당 입구에서 만나는 것으로 괜찮습니까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 可以，晚上見！
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, wǎnshang jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, wan3shang jian4!
turns.translation_en: Okay, see you in the evening!
turns.translation_ko: 네, 저녁에 뵙겠습니다!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What do A and B plan to do this evening?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: A와 B는 오늘 저녁에 무엇을 할 계획입니까?
options_en: Eat dinner and watch a movie
comprehension_questions.answer_en: Eat dinner and watch a movie

shadowing_prompt: Repeat the dialogue, focusing on making suggestions and confirming plans.
free_response_prompt: Make an evening plan with a friend using 一起, 然後, and 可以嗎.

title: 邀請喝咖啡

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你明天有空嗎？我們一起去喝咖啡，好不好？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ míngtiān yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù hē kāfēi, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ming2tian1 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 he1 ka1fei1, hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: Are you free tomorrow? How about we go for coffee together?
turns.translation_ko: 내일 시간 있으세요? 같이 커피 마시러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可以啊！我明天下午有空。你想去哪裡喝咖啡？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ a! Wǒ míngtiān xiàwǔ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng qù nǎlǐ hē kāfēi?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3 a5! Wo3 ming2tian1 xia4wu3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 qu4 na3li3 he1 ka1fei1?
turns.translation_en: Sure! I'm free tomorrow afternoon. Where do you want to go for coffee?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 내일 오후에 시간 있어요. 어디로 커피 마시러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們去車站前面的那家咖啡店，好嗎？那裡的咖啡很好喝。
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen qù chēzhàn qiánmiàn de nà jiā kāfēi diàn, hǎo ma? Nàlǐ de kāfēi hěn hǎo hē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men qu4 che1zhan4 qian2mian4 de5 na4 jia1 ka1fei1 dian4, hao3 ma5? Na4li3 de5 ka1fei1 hen3 hao3 he1.
turns.translation_en: Let's go to that coffee shop in front of the station, okay? Their coffee is really good.
turns.translation_ko: 역 앞에 있는 그 커피숍에 갈까요? 거기 커피가 아주 맛있어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！我們約下午兩點，在咖啡店門口碰面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒmen yuē xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, zài kāfēi diàn ménkǒu pèngmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5! Wo3men yue1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3, zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 men2kou3 peng4mian4, ke3yi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Great! Let's meet at 2 PM at the coffee shop entrance, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 오후 2시에 커피숍 입구에서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題。明天下午兩點見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Ming2tian1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3 jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem. See you tomorrow at 2 PM!
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요. 내일 오후 2시에 뵐게요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What time do they plan to meet?

title: 建議時間

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們這個週末一起去看電影，好不好？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: How about we go see a movie together this weekend?
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可以啊！你想看什麼電影？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ a! Nǐ xiǎng kàn shénme diànyǐng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3 a5! Ni3 xiang3 kan4 shen2 me0 dian4ying3?

turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 무슨 영화 보고 싶으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想看那部新的中文電影。你星期六有空嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng kàn nà bù xīn de zhōngwén diànyǐng. Nǐ xīngqīliù yǒu kòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 kan4 na4 bu4 xin1 de5 zhong1wen2 dian4ying3. Ni3 xing1qi1liu4 you3 kong4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I want to see that new Chinese movie. Are you free on Saturday?
turns.translation_ko: 그 새 중국 영화 보고 싶어요. 토요일에 시간 있으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 星期六上午我要上班，下午可以。我們約下午三點，在電影院門口碰面，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xīngqīliù shàngwǔ wǒ yào shàngbān, xiàwǔ kěyǐ. Wǒmen yuē xiàwǔ sān diǎn, zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu pèngmiàn, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xing1qi1liu4 shang4wu3 wo3 yao4 shang4ban1, xia4wu3 ke3yi3. Wo3men yue1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3, zai4 dian4ying3yuan4 men2kou3 peng4mian4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I have to work Saturday morning, but I'm free in the afternoon. Let's meet at 3 PM at the cinema entrance, okay?

turns.speaker: A

turns.translation_en: I'm not free this weekend either, because I'm going to Taipei to see a friend. Let's make plans another time, okay?

title: 搭捷運去台北車站

turns.speaker: A

turns.pinyin_numeric: bu2 yong4, zhe4 shi4 zhi2 da2 de5. xia4 yi4 ban1 che1 da4 gai4 san1 fen1 zhong1 dao4.
turns.translation_en: No, it's direct. The next train arrives in about three minutes.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 직통입니다. 다음 열차가 약 3분 후에 도착해요.

turns.speaker: A

turns.pinyin_numeric: tai4 hao3 le5, xie4 xie4 ni3!

title: 叫計程車去夜市

title: 坐過站了

turns.speaker: 乘客
turns.text: 不好意思，我好像坐過站了。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ hǎoxiàng zuò guò zhàn le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, wo3 hao3 xiang4 zuo4 guo4 zhan4 le5.
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, I think I missed my stop.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 제가 정류장을 지나친 것 같아요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒關係，下一站是台北車站，你要在那裡下車嗎？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, xià yī zhàn shì Táiběi Chēzhàn, nǐ yào zài nàlǐ xià chē ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 guan1 xi5, xia4 yi1 zhan4 shi4 Tai2 bei3 Che1 zhan4, ni3 yao4 zai4 na4 li3 xia4 che1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: No problem. The next stop is Taipei Main Station. Would you like to get off there?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요. 다음 역은 타이베이 역이에요. 거기서 내리실 건가요?

turns.speaker: 乘客
turns.text: 對，我要去台北車站。可是我要往回走，對不對？

turns.translation_en: Yes, I need to go to Taipei Main Station. But I have to go back, right?

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 對，你下車以後，到對面搭反方向的車，坐一站就到了。
turns.pinyin: Duì, nǐ xià chē yǐhòu, dào duìmiàn dā fǎn fāngxiàng de chē, zuò yī zhàn jiù dào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: dui4, ni3 xia4 che1 yi3 hou4, dao4 dui4 mian4 da1 fan3 fang1 xiang4 de5 che1, zuo4 yi1 zhan4 jiu4 dao4 le5.

turns.speaker: 乘客
turns.text: 好，謝謝你。我趕時間，希望還來得及。

turns.pinyin_numeric: hao3, xie4 xie4 ni3. Wo3 gan3 shi2 jian1, xi1 wang4 hai2 lai2 de5 ji2.

turns.translation_ko: 네, 감사합니다. 시간이 촉박해서 아직 늦지 않았으면 좋겠네요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 沒問題，下一班車三分鐘後到，你來得及。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, xià yī bān chē sān fēnzhōng hòu dào, nǐ láidejí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: mei2 wen4 ti2, xia4 yi1 ban1 che1 san1 fen1 zhong1 hou4 dao4, ni3 lai2 de5 ji2.
turns.translation_en: No problem. The next train arrives in three minutes. You'll make it.
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요. 다음 차가 3분 후에 도착하니까 시간 안에 가실 수 있어요.

turns.speaker: 店員
turns.text: 有，這件是小號白色的。試衣間在後面右邊。

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 謝謝。我試穿一下。

turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4. Wo3 shi4chuan1 yi1xia4.

turns.speaker: 店員

turns.speaker: 客人
turns.text: 這件裙子很舒服，也很合身。我要買這件。
turns.pinyin: Zhè jiàn qúnzi hěn shūfú, yě hěn héshēn. Wǒ yào mǎi zhè jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 jian4 qun2zi hen3 shu1fu2, ye3 hen3 he2shen1. Wo3 yao4 mai3 zhe4 jian4.
turns.translation_en: This skirt is very comfortable and fits well. I'll buy this one.

title: 熱天聊天
scenario: small talk about weather and feelings

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 今天天氣好熱，你有沒有覺得？
turns.pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hǎo rè, nǐ yǒu méiyǒu juéde?

turns.translation_en: The weather is so hot today, don't you think?
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 날씨가 정말 덥죠, 그렇지 않나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對啊，今天三十度，真的很熱。
turns.pinyin: Duì a, jīntiān sānshí dù, zhēn de hěn rè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4 a, jin1tian1 san1shi2 du4, zhen1 de hen3 re4.

turns.translation_ko: 맞아요, 오늘 30도라서 정말 덥네요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想喝一杯冰咖啡，你要不要也喝？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng hē yī bēi bīng kāfēi, nǐ yào bù yào yě hē?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 he1 yi1 bei1 bing1 ka1fei1, ni3 yao4 bu4 yao4 ye3 he1?
turns.translation_en: I would like an iced coffee, do you want one too?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊，我也很渴。我們去咖啡店吧。

turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a, wo3 ye3 hen3 ke3. Wo3men qu4 ka1fei1 dian4 ba.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 今天太陽很大，我們要小心路滑。
turns.pinyin: Jīntiān tàiyáng hěn dà, wǒmen yào xiǎoxīn lù huá.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jin1tian1 tai4yang2 hen3 da4, wo3men yao4 xiao3xin1 lu4 hua2.
turns.translation_en: The sun is very strong today, we need to be careful of slippery roads.
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 태양이 강해서 길이 미끄러우니 조심해야 해요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，我們慢慢走。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, wǒmen màn man zǒu.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3men man4 man zou3.
turns.translation_en: No problem, we'll walk slowly.
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 천천히 걸어요.

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Describe today's weather and what you want to drink.

title: 下雨天的心情
scenario: small talk about weather and feelings

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 今天下雨了，你有帶傘嗎？
turns.pinyin: Jīntiān xià yǔ le, nǐ yǒu dài sǎn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jin1tian1 xia4 yu3 le, ni3 you3 dai4 san3 ma?
turns.translation_en: It's raining today, did you bring an umbrella?
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 비가 오는데, 우산 가져왔어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有，我帶了。可是我的心情不太好。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, wǒ dài le. Kěshì wǒ de xīnqíng bù tài hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3, wo3 dai4 le. Ke3shi4 wo3 de xin1qing2 bu4 tai4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I brought it. But I'm not in a very good mood.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 가져왔어요. 그런데 기분이 별로 좋지 않아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 為什麼？下雨天讓你心情不好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wèishénme? Xià yǔ tiān ràng nǐ xīnqíng bù hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: wei4 shen2 me0? Xia4 yu3 tian1 rang4 ni3 xin1qing2 bu4 hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Why? Does rainy weather make you feel bad?
turns.translation_ko: 왜요? 비 오는 날이 기분을 안 좋게 하나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，我比較喜歡晴天。有太陽的時候，心情比較好。
turns.pinyin: Duì, wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān qíngtiān. Yǒu tàiyáng de shíhou, xīnqíng bǐjiào hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, wo3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 qing2tian1. You3 tai4yang2 de shi2hou, xin1qing2 bi3jiao4 hao3.
turns.translation_en: Yes, I prefer sunny days. When there's sun, my mood is better.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 저는 맑은 날을 더 좋아해요. 해가 있을 때 기분이 더 좋아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我懂。不過下雨天可以放鬆，在家看書也不錯。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ dǒng. Bùguò xià yǔ tiān kěyǐ fàngsōng, zài jiā kàn shū yě bùcuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 dong3. Bu4guo4 xia4 yu3 tian1 ke3yi3 fang4song1, zai4 jia1 kan4 shu1 ye3 bu2cuo4.
turns.translation_en: I understand. But rainy days can be relaxing, reading at home is also nice.
turns.translation_ko: 이해해요. 하지만 비 오는 날은 긴장을 풀 수 있고, 집에서 책 읽는 것도 괜찮아요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 你說得對。那我今天回家看書好了。
turns.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì. Nà wǒ jīntiān huí jiā kàn shū hǎo le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 shuo1 de dui4. Na4 wo3 jin1tian1 hui2 jia1 kan4 shu1 hao3 le.
turns.translation_en: You're right. Then I'll go home and read a book today.
turns.translation_ko: 맞는 말이에요. 그럼 오늘 집에 가서 책을 읽을게요.

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.
free_response_prompt: Talk about your mood on rainy days.

title: 今天好累
scenario: small talk about weather and feelings

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你今天看起來很累，怎麼了？

turns.speaker: B

turns.pinyin: Duì a, wǒ jīntiān yālì hěn dà, gōngzuò tài duō le.

turns.speaker: B

turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a, xie4xie5 ni3. San4bu4 yi3hou4, xin1qing2 ying1gai1 hui4 bi3jiao4 hao3.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我聽說有一部新電影很好看，是關於台灣小吃的。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ tīngshuō yǒu yī bù xīn diànyǐng hěn hǎokàn, shì guānyú Táiwān xiǎochī de.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 ting1shuo1 you3 yi1 bu4 xin1 dian4ying3 hen3 hao3kan4, shi4 guan1yu2 Tai2wan1 xiao3chi1 de.
turns.translation_en: I heard there's a new movie that's really good, about Taiwanese street food.
turns.translation_ko: 새 영화 하나가 정말 재미있다고 들었어요, 대만 길거리 음식에 관한 거예요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 聽起來不錯！我們可以先去吃午餐，再看電影。
turns.pinyin: Tīng qǐlai bùcuò! Wǒmen kěyǐ xiān qù chī wǔcān, zài kàn diànyǐng.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ting1 qi3lai bu2cuo4! Wo3men ke3yi3 xian1 qu4 chi1 wu3can1, zai4 kan4 dian4ying3.
turns.translation_en: Sounds great! We can go have lunch first, then watch the movie.
turns.translation_ko: 좋네요! 먼저 점심 먹고, 영화 보러 가요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好，那我們約星期六中午十二點在餐廳門口見面，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nà wǒmen yuē xīngqīliù zhōngwǔ shí'èr diǎn zài cāntīng ménkǒu jiànmiàn, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, na4 wo3men yue1 xing1qi1liu4 zhong1wu3 shi2'er4 dian3 zai4 can1ting1 men2kou3 jian4mian4, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Okay, then let's meet at the restaurant entrance at noon on Saturday, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요, 그럼 토요일 낮 12시에 식당 입구에서 만나요, 괜찮죠?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 沒問題，到時候見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí, dào shíhou jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2, dao4 shi2hou jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem, see you then!
turns.translation_ko: 문제없어요, 그때 봐요!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What day and time do they plan to meet?
What will they do first?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, focusing on the flow of making plans (先...再..., 約...見面). Practice the tones for time expressions.
free_response_prompt: You want to invite a friend to go to a night market this weekend. Suggest Saturday evening, and say you can eat and walk around. Ask if they are free. Say this in Chinese.
